title: Magic Fabric
description: A rather magic focused pack. Its built on Fabric.
body:
### <center> Welcome to Magic Fabric!
 <center> 
   
   ##### [Discord](https://discord.gg/qDWxaKgB3u)
   

<hr/> 

We've got a whole buncha magic\
We're built on Fabric\
Need I say more?

</center>
<hr/>

###  <center> Primary Features

- **✈️ Explore** - Travel the universe with [Tardis: Refined](https://modrinth.com/mod/tardis-refined)
- **🕳️ Portals** - Look before you leap with [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals)
 
- **🔮 Arcane Discovery** - Unravel the arcane with the More Magic Series! 
- **🛡️ Team up or go solo** - Lay claim to your land with [OPAC](https://modrinth.com/mod/open-parties-and-claims)
- **➕And more!** - Cant give away all the fun now, can I?
<hr/>

This pack is primarily built for the official Magic Fabric server, but dont let that stop you from embarking on your own singleplayer adventure!
###### (Official server IP address is preloaded into the modpack. Owned by Swiftercat)
